appDesc.message: Adds Markdown, TXT, HTML, JSON, DOCX, PDF, EPUB, LaTeX and more export options to Gemini Deep Research.

cmdExportPrimary.message: Export the report in your primary format

cmdDownloadAll.message: Download the report in all enabled formats (ZIP)

toastNoHeadings.message: This report has no section headings.

optSectionsHint.message: Pick one or more headings from the report and export just those sections in any format

toastDiagSaved.message: Diagnostics report downloaded. You can attach it to a bug report from Settings.

toastNoContent.message: No Deep Research content found to export.

toastCopiedHtml.message: Copied — paste into Google Docs or Word with formatting intact.

toastVaultEmpty.message: Nothing to export to a vault.

toastNoFormats.message: No download formats enabled. Enable at least one in Settings.

popBeta.message: Beta release - some exports may not be fully stable yet. Please report any issues you run into.

popHint.message: Right-click on any Gemini Deep Research page to export

optBetaStrip.message: Beta release. Some exports may not be fully stable yet - if something looks off, please let us know.

optWelcomeTitle.message: You're all set - here's how to export your first report

optWelcomeStep1.message: Open a Deep Research report on gemini.google.com.

optWelcomeStep2.message: Click "Share & export" on the report (or right-click anywhere on the page) - you'll see the new format entries there.

optWelcomeStep3.message: Pick your format - Markdown, PDF, Word and Reader HTML are ready out of the box; enable more below.

optOverviewLead.message: More Export for Gemini turns a Gemini Deep Research report into clean, ready-to-use files - Markdown, PDF, Word, LaTeX, EPUB and 10 more - with citations, metadata and a table of contents woven in. Everything runs locally in your browser.

optStep1Desc.message: On any Gemini report, right-click and pick a format from the More Export menu.

optStep2Desc.message: Click the toolbar icon to copy or download in one click.

optStep3Desc.message: Press <kbd>Ctrl/Cmd</kbd>+<kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>E</kbd> to export your primary format.

optFeat1Desc.message: Markdown, PDF, Word, RTF, LaTeX, EPUB, HTML and more.

optFeat2Desc.message: 9 citation styles plus BibTeX, RIS and CSL-JSON exports.

optFeat3Desc.message: Author, affiliation, keywords and abstract woven into exports.

optFeat4Desc.message: Tune TOC, footnotes or citation style for a single format.

optFeat5Desc.message: Scan a report for issues locally before you export.

optFeat6Desc.message: Export your settings to JSON and import them anywhere.

optPrivacyNote.message: Everything runs locally in your browser - your reports are never uploaded.

optFooterText.message: Made for researchers and knowledge workers

optLanguageHint.message: Menus, popup and this page. "Auto" follows your browser's language.

optProfilesHint.message: Save the current formats, options and overrides as a named profile - e.g. Academic paper (A4, double spacing, APA) vs Quick notes (Obsidian MD, no TOC) - and switch in one click, here or from the popup.

optFootnotesHint.message: Add source references from Deep Research reports

optTocHint.message: Generate a table of contents from headings

optTemplateHint.message: Customize exported file names using tokens

optPrimaryHint.message: Used by the Export primary keyboard shortcut

optLayoutHint.message: Page size, margins and typography for PDF, HTML, Word (.docx) and LaTeX. Defaults match the previous fixed layout. The Reader HTML format has its own settings above.

optPaperHint.message: Page size for PDF / DOCX / LaTeX

optDedupeHint.message: Combine identical source URLs and renumber references

optSortHint.message: Order of the sources list (references are renumbered to match)

optEnrichHint.message: Extract DOI/ISBN from source URLs and titles into BibTeX / RIS / CSL-JSON

optReaderIntro.message: Defaults baked into the HTML – Reader export. Chosen here once, before export, so the file ships clean - no in-page buttons.

optReaderThemeHint.message: Color scheme of the exported reader

optReaderWidthHint.message: Comfortable keeps an optimal line length; Wide uses more of the screen

optReaderFontHint.message: Sans is crisp on screen; Serif reads like print for long reports

optReaderSizeHint.message: Scales the whole page while keeping line length balanced

optReaderAccentHint.message: Links, active outline and the progress bar

optOutlineHint.message: Show a sticky section outline (collapses to a drawer on phones)

optProgressHint.message: Thin bar at the top showing how far you've scrolled

optJustifyHint.message: Align paragraphs to both edges (with hyphenation)

optMetaIntro.message: Optional. Woven into exports that support it - LaTeX \author / abstract, DOCX/EPUB properties, HTML/PDF head & byline, and Obsidian front matter. Leave blank to omit.

optAuthorHint.message: Name(s) shown as the document byline

optKeywordsHint.message: Comma-separated; added to metadata and a Keywords line

optAbstractHint.message: Short summary placed before the body

optAbstractPlaceholder.message: A brief summary of the report…

optOverridesIntro.message: Optional. Override the global Table of Contents, Footnotes and Citation Style for a specific format. Pick a format, then choose Inherit to keep the global value or set an explicit one. Affects single exports and the bundle.

optFormatsIntro.message: Pick which formats show up in the right-click menu and the popup. Up to 12 can be enabled at once.

optClipHtmlHint.message: Rich HTML — pastes into Google Docs, Word or email with headings, tables and formatting intact

optReaderFmtHint.message: Clean, modern reading page with light/dark theme

optCsvHint.message: Extracts tables for Excel / Google Sheets

optXlsxHint.message: Real Excel workbook — one sheet per table, bold frozen header, numeric cells ready for formulas

optRtfHint.message: Universal rich text - pastes into Word, Pages, email

optEpubHint.message: E-book for Kindle, Apple Books, etc.

optVaultHint.message: Markdown + references.md + per-table CSVs for Obsidian / Notion

optZipAllHint.message: Export all enabled formats in a single ZIP archive

optBugRowHint.message: Opens a short report form, pre-filled with your extension version and browser. Since the extension is in beta, your reports directly help stabilize it.

optSuggestRowHint.message: Have an idea or a format you'd love to see? Send a quick suggestion - it helps shape the roadmap.

optDonateRowHint.message: The extension is free and open source. If it saves you time, a voluntary coffee helps fund new formats and languages.

optQualityRowHint.message: Scans the current Deep Research page for issues before you export: heading structure & empty headings, empty or ragged tables, unmatched footnotes, duplicate sources, broken math, missing alt text. Runs locally (no network) and lists the findings below. Requires an active Gemini Deep Research page.

optExportSettingsHint.message: Download all formats and options as a JSON file

optImportSettingsHint.message: Restore from a previously exported JSON file

optReexportIntro.message: Convert a previously exported .json report into any other format - fully offline, using your current export options (layout, sources, citations). No Gemini page needed.

optChooseFilePrompt.message: Choose a JSON report exported by this extension.

optReexportRowHint.message: Produce the chosen format from the loaded report

optRecentHint.message: Backed up automatically on every export (last 10, stored only on this device). Load one to re-export it without the Gemini page.

optDebugExportHint.message: Exports all formats × all citation styles × all markdown flavors as a single ZIP. Requires an active Gemini Deep Research page.

optDiagRowHint.message: Checks how robustly the current Gemini page maps onto the extractor (content root, block counts, source/footnote matching, math). Downloads gep-diagnostics.txt. Requires an active Gemini Deep Research page.

optMaxToast.message: Max $1 formats allowed in the dropdown menu

optResetModalDesc.message: This will restore every option to its default value.

optImportNothing.message: No recognizable settings found in file.

optProfileNameFirst.message: Give the profile a name first.

optProfileLimit.message: Profile limit reached ($1). Delete one first.

optSyncQuotaWarn.message: Sync storage almost full: $1% used — delete a profile to free space

optNoBlocks.message: No report blocks found in this JSON.

optReportLoaded.message: Report loaded. Pick a format and export.

optBackupUnreadable.message: This backup could not be read.

optBackupGone.message: This backup is no longer available.

optLoadedFromHistory.message: Report loaded from history. Pick a format and export.

optNoBackups.message: No backups yet - they appear here after your first export.

optNoGeminiTab.message: No Gemini tab found. Open a Deep Research page first.

optNoContentScript.message: Could not reach content script. Refresh the Gemini page.
